name: codex-workflow-skills
description: Guided workflow intake and evidence-based adversarial review skills for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Guided intake and adversarial review loops.
interface.longDescription: Codex Workflow Skills adds reusable skills for workflow routing, scoped intake, and evidence-based adversarial review.
defaultPrompt: Use $workflow to route my request to intake or review.
Use $workflow-intake to scope this task before implementation.
Use $adversarial-review-loop to review this plan or diff.
